item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: A selection of fresh seasonal vegetables that you can combine with a protein of your choice and create your own meal salad.

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Slow-roasted turkey cuvette with sauce espagnole, soft onions and butter-baked new potatoes. Served with a selection of pickles (11+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Baked Canadian salmon with silky smooth herb sauce and spinach. Lemon and mustard vinaigrette (1+6+15) GREEN DISH: dish Baked lightly smoked tofu with silky smooth herb sauce and spinach. Lemon and mustard vinaigrette (1+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Spiced Greek patty with creamy tzatziki, crispy oven-roasted potatoes, feta and olives – YAMAS! (6+15) GREEN DISH: dish GREEN DISH: Greek patty of lentils and herbs with tzatziki, oven-roasted potatoes, feta and olives (6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Slow-cooked pulled pork with crispy roasted potatoes, creamy cheese sauce, jalapeños and spring onions (1+6+15) GREEN DISH: dish Pulled jackfruit with crispy roasted potatoes, creamy cheese sauce, jalapeños and spring onions (1+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Mexican spiced pork neck in a crispy wheat wrap, served with chipotle-spiced fries. With fresh vegetables and a selection of dipping sauces (1+2+6+11+15) GREEN DISH: dish Mexican spiced pea protein in a crispy wheat wrap, served with chipotle-spiced fries. With fresh vegetables and a selection of dipping sauces (1+2+6+11+15)
